ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Code for the province (e.g., NL, ON, BC) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the province record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the province record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "boundary_description" TEXT /* Description of the district boundaries */,
  "electors" INTEGER /* Number of electors in the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the election was held in */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, provincial, municipal) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "total_polls" INTEGER /* Total number of polls in the election */,
  "valid_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of valid ballots cast */,
  "rejected_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of rejected ballots */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  "electoral_officer" TEXT /* Name of the electoral officer responsible for the election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the candidate ran in */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "votes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the candidate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the voter turnout is for */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "electors" INTEGER /* Number of electors in the district */,
  "voter_turnout_percent" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "advanced_polls" INTEGER /* Number of advanced polls */,
  "election_day_polls" INTEGER /* Number of election day polls */,
  "mail_in_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in ballots */,
  "special_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of special ballots */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the voter turnout record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the voter turnout record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the election results */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_versions_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
